interpretation: No reliable performance conclusion can be made.
recommended_action: Verify telemetry, meter availability and data acquisition before performance analysis.

operational_rule: Valid day with no daily, 7-day or 30-day threshold breach.
interpretation: Performance remains within the calibration reference range.
A single-day deviation is present but is not yet considered sustained.
recommended_action: Check the following days and verify obvious weather or data-quality anomalies.

operational_rule: The 7-day or 30-day indicator is below its threshold, but the operational persistence requirement has not yet been reached.
recommended_action: Review recent measurements, irradiance data and equipment logs.

operational_rule: Rolling 7-day indicator below -17.259% for at least 3 consecutive valid days.
interpretation: Underperformance is sustained over the short term.
recommended_action: Check sensor consistency, inverter availability, soiling, shading and operational interruptions.

operational_rule: Rolling 30-day indicator below -16.981% for at least 7 consecutive valid days.
recommended_action: Initiate a documented technical investigation and compare with maintenance and inverter records.

operational_rule: Rolling 30-day indicator below -16.981% for at least 30 consecutive valid days.
interpretation: Long-lasting model-relative underperformance requiring priority investigation.
recommended_action: Escalate the technical inspection and perform root-cause analysis before model retraining.
